content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Dark_Forces_Box_Cover.jpg|thumb|200px|''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'' released in February 1995.]]

A list of events in '''1995''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 1|01]] – [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 2|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 2]] published.
*[[January 3|03]] – [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 6|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 6]] published.
*[[January 10|10]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 4|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 4]] published.
*[[January 24|24]] – [[Dark Empire II 2|''Dark Empire II'' 2]] published.
*[[January 26|26]] – [[Pat Welsh]] dies.
*[[January 31|31]] – [[Star Wars: Droids Special|''Star Wars: Droids Special'' 1]] published.

==February==
*[[February 1|01]] – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 5|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 5]] published.
*[[February 2|02]] – ''[[Ambush at Corellia]]'' published.
*[[February 14|14]] – [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 7|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 7]] published.
*14 – [[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 5|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 5]] published.
*[[February 15|15]] – ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] platform.
*[[February 18|18]] – [[Emily Shkoukani]] is born.
*[[February 19|19]] – [[Nigel D. Findley]] dies.
*[[February 21|21]] – [[Dark Empire II 3|''Dark Empire II'' 3]] published.
*?? – [[BioWare]] is founded.
*?? – ''[[Platt's Starport Guide]]'' published.

==March==
*[[March 1|01]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 98|''Classic Star Wars: The Vandelhelm Mission'']] published.
*[[March 14|14]] – [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 8|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 8]] published.
*14 – [[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 6|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 6]] published.
*[[March 21|21]] – [[Dark Empire II 4|''Dark Empire II'' 4]] published.
*[[March 31|31]] – ''[[Star Wars Technical Journal]]'' published in UK.
*?? – ''[[Goroth: Slave of the Empire]]'' published.

==April==
*[[April 1|01]] – [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 3|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 3]] published.
*[[April 4|04]] – ''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Gaar Suppoon Hit]]'' published.
*[[April 11|11]] – [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 9|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 9]] published.
*11 – [[Droids (1995) 1|''Droids'' 1]] published.
*[[April 14|14]] – [[Burl Ives]] dies.
*[[April 18|18]] – [[Dark Empire II 5|''Dark Empire II'' 5]] published.
*?? – ''[[Flashpoint! Brak Sector]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Galladinium's Fantastic Technology]]'' published.

==May==
*[[May 1|01]] – [[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] published.
*01 - [[Jake Cannavale]] is born.
*[[May 2|02]] – [[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II audio drama'']] released on Cassette.
*[[May 3|03]] – [[Anna Rust]] is born.
*[[May 16|16]] – [[Droids (1995) 2|''Droids'' 2]] published.
*[[May 23|23]] – [[Dark Empire II 6|''Dark Empire II'' 6]] published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 6|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 6]] published.
*?? – ''[[Classic Star Wars: A New Hope (Random House)]]'' published.

==June==
*[[June 1|01]] – ''[[Assault at Selonia]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Heirs of the Force]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' published.
*[[June 6|06]] – [[River of Chaos 1|''River of Chaos'' 1]] published.
*[[June 13|13]] – [[Droids (1995) 3|''Droids'' 3]] published.
*[[June 20|20]] – ''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Hunger of Princess Nampi]]'' published.

==July==
*[[July 1|01]] – [[Classic Star Wars Volume 2: The Rebel Storm]] published.
*01 – [[Droids (1995) 4|''Droids'' 4]] published.
*01 – [[River of Chaos 2|''River of Chaos'' 2]] published.
*01 – [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 4|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 4]] published.
*01 – [[Star Wars: The Power of the Force (1995 toy line)|''Star Wars: Power of the Force'']] toy line released.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars Technical Journal of the Imperial Forces]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]'' published.
*01 – [[We Don't Do Weddings: The Band's Tale (audio drama)|''We Don't Do Weddings: The Band's Tale audio drama'']] released on Cassette.
*01 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 1|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 1]] published.
*[[July 17|17]] – ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' published.

==August==
*[[August 1|01]] – ''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Dynasty Trap]]'' published.
*01 – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 7|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 7]] published.
*01 – ''[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron Special]]'' published.
*[[August 8|08]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 2|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 2]] published.
*[[August 15|15]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 1]] published.

==September==
*[[September 1|01]] – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Shadow Academy]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]'' published.
*[[September 5|05]] – [[Star Wars: Dark Empire II (TPB)|''Dark Empire II'' trade paperback]] is published.
*[[September 19|19]] – [[River of Chaos 3|''River of Chaos'' 3]] published.
*19 – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 2]] published.
*[[September 26|26]] – [[Droids (1995) 5|''Droids'' (1995) 5]] published.
*26 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 3|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 3]] is published.
*?? – ''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]'' published.

==October==
*[[October 1|01]] – [[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] hardcover published.
*01 – [[Heir to the Empire 1|''Heir to the Empire'' 1]] published.
*01 – [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 5|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 5]] published.
*[[October 8|08]] – ''[[Junior Jedi Knights: The Golden Globe]]'' published.
*[[October 10|10]] – ''[[Star Wars Technical Journal]]'' published in the USA.
*[[October 17|17]] – ''[[Dark Empire: The Collector's Edition]]'' released.
*17 – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 3]] published.
*[[October 24|24]] – [[Empire's End 1|''Empire's End'' 1]] published.
*24 – [[River of Chaos 4|''River of Chaos'' 4]] published.
*[[October 29|29]] – ''[[The Lost Jedi Adventure Game Book]]'' published.
*[[October 31|31]] – [[Droids (1995) 6|''Droids'' (1995) 6]] published.
*31 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 4|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 4]] is published.
*?? – ''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi (Second Edition)]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[The Mos Eisley Cantina Pop-Up Book]]'' published.

==November==
*[[November 1|01]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 4]] published.
*01 – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 8|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 8]] published.
*[[November 7|07]] – [[Heir to the Empire 2|''Heir to the Empire'' 2]] published.
*[[November 21|21]] – [[Classic Star Wars: A New Hope (TPB)|''Classic Star Wars: A New Hope'']] published.
*21 – [[Classic Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (TPB)|''Classic Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'']] published.
*[[November 28|28]] – [[Empire's End 2|''Empire's End'' 2]] published.
*28 – [[Droids (1995) 7|''Droids'' (1995) 7]] published.
*?? – ''[[The Illustrated Star Wars Universe]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]'' released.
*?? – [[Nightlily: The Lovers' Tale (audio drama)|''Nightlily: The Lovers' Tale audio drama'']] released on Cassette.
*?? – [[Mardji]] dies.

==December==
*[[December 1|01]] – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Lost Ones]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Tales from Jabba's Palace]]'' published.
*[[December 2|02]] – [[Hayley Mooy]] is born.
*[[December 4|04]] – ''[[The Crystal Star]]'' paperback published.
*[[December 5|05]] – ''[[Boba Fett: Bounty on Bar-Kooda]]'' published.
*[[December 11|11]] – ''[[Heroes & Rogues]]'' published.
*[[December 12|12]] – [[Heir to the Empire 3|''Heir to the Empire'' 3]] published.
*[[December 19|19]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 5|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 5]] published.
*[[December 26|26]] – [[Droids (1995) 8|''Droids'' (1995) 8]] published.
*26 – [[Splinter of the Mind's Eye 1|''Splinter of the Mind's Eye'' 1]] published.

==Unknown==
*[[Fantasy Flight Games]] founded.
*''[[Classic Adventures]]'' published.
*''[[Classic Adventures: Volume Two]]'' published.
*''[[Galaxy Guide 1: A New Hope (Second Edition)]]'' published.
*''[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin (Second Edition)]]'' published. {{C|pre-[[July]]}}<ref name="Date">''Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin'', Second Edition includes an advertisement page in the back of the book previewing the [[July]] [[1995]] release of ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]''.</ref>
*– [[Star Wars Insider 24|''Star Wars Insider'' 24]] published in Winter.
*– [[Star Wars Insider 25|''Star Wars Insider'' 25]] published in Spring.
*– [[Star Wars Insider 26|''Star Wars Insider'' 26]] published in Summer.
*– [[Star Wars Insider 27|''Star Wars Insider'' 27]] published in Fall.

==Notes and references==
